other_observers: Mark Peterson, others. Mark agreed with ID
description: Smallish "large gull" (i.e., smaller than nearby HERGs). Back feathers fresh, pale gray, paler than those of HERG. Wing coverts and tertials worn; wing coverts essentially concolorous, grayish-brown or brownish-gray. Tertials nearly white with some speckling. Primaries with narrow pale brown centers and broad white edges. Beneath, white with some brown mottling. Eye darkish. Bill pink/yellow tipped in black; delicate. Head rounded, not quite as dove-like as some, but more gentle than most HERG present. Bill smaller than those of nearby HERG. Legs Pink.
